puzzle.hint: A deed or effort, often with consequences.
puzzle.arabicVerse: وَلِكُلٍّۢ دَرَجَـٰتٌۭ مِّمَّا عَمِلُوا۟ ۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَـٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعْمَلُونَ
puzzle.verse: 6:132 — And for all are degrees [i.e., positions resulting] from what they have done. And your Lord is not unaware of what they do.
